member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Data.Search.Indexed.CustomerOrderChangesProvider.GetChangesFromRepositoryAsync(System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Get documents from repository and return them as changes

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Data.Search.Indexed.CustomerOrderChangesProvider.GetChangesFromOperationLogAsync(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Get changes from operation log

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Data.Search.Indexed.FilterHelper.FieldName
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^(?<fieldName>[A-Za-z0-9\\-]+)(_[A-Za-z]{3})?$
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ "fieldName" capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [\-0-9A-Za-z\u0130\u212A] greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match '_'.
○ Match a character in the set [A-Za-z\u0130\u212A] exactly 3 times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Data.Search.Indexed.FilterHelper.SetAppliedAggregations(VirtoCommerce.SearchModule.Core.Model.SearchRequest,System.Collections.Generic.IList{VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.Search.OrderAggregation})
member.summary: Checks aggregation item values for the equality with the filters, and set to those, whose value equal to on of the filters

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Data.Services.CustomerOrderStatisticService.CollectStatisticsAsync(System.DateTime,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Calculates various order statistics for a dashboard based on the provided start and end dates.
member.returns: Returns a DashboardStatisticsResult object that encapsulates the computed statistics.

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Data.Services.DefaultCustomerOrderTotalsCalculator
member.summary: Respond for totals values calculation for Customer order and all nested objects

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Data.Services.DefaultCustomerOrderTotalsCalculator.CalculateTotals(VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Core.Model.CustomerOrder)
member.summary: Order subtotal discount When a discount is applied to the cart subtotal, the tax calculation has already been applied, and is reflected in the tax subtotal. Therefore, a discount applying to the cart subtotal will occur after tax. For instance, if the cart subtotal is $100, and $15 is the tax subtotal, a cart - wide discount of 10 % will yield a total of $105($100 subtotal – $10 discount + $15 tax on the original $100).

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Data.Validators.OrderDocumentCountValidator
member.summary:
Validates that the total number of child documents (operations) per order does not exceed the configured maximum limit. Uses the IOperation.ChildrenOperations tree structure for generic traversal. This ensures system performance, storage optimization, and data consistency.
This validator works with IOperation interface, making it applicable to any operation type, though it's primarily designed for root-level operations like CustomerOrder.

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.OrdersModule.Data.Validators.OrderDocumentCountValidator.GetOperationBreakdown(System.Collections.Generic.IList{VirtoCommerce.CoreModule.Core.Common.IOperation})
member.summary: Creates a human-readable breakdown of operations by type

member.summary: Custom -derived type for the FieldName method.

member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.FieldName_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.FieldName_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.FieldName_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.FieldName_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.FieldName_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "-0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzİK".
